$comment: Coverage thresholds source of truth. apps/backend/vitest.config.ts reads this file at startup so Vitest enforces in-process; out-of-process CI tooling can enforce against the same numbers. Baseline note: the previous floor (86.25 / 80.15 / 80.03) was measured by `tsx --test --experimental-test-coverage` and overstated coverage because that tool only counted files actually loaded by tests. After the 2026-05-09 round of targeted tests (mappers, resolvers, breakers, claude/SDK helpers, RBAC, cron, response serialization, workspace artifact capture, pii-rule edge cases) the v8 measurement is 74.96/67.20/74.96 (lines/branches/functions). Thresholds set ~2 points below measurement to give the suite headroom for unrelated edits; ratchet upward as gaps close.

enforcement.description: Out-of-process CI tooling that consumes this file should check coverage against these thresholds before allowing a task or PR to land. Vitest also enforces these thresholds in-process via apps/backend/vitest.config.ts.
